levels.descEn: Able to airborne a motorized infantry in designated areas
levels.descTemplate: Able to airborne a motorized infantry in designated areas

levels.descEn: Able to airborne a mechanized infantry in designated areas
levels.descTemplate: Able to airborne a mechanized infantry in designated areas

longDesc: Recherche aérienne qui améliore la portée et la létalité des escadrons. « Airborne » monte jusqu'au niveau 2. Effet maximum : « Able to airborne a mechanized infantry in designated areas ». Accessible dès le début de la recherche. Indispensable sur Sea Lion, Barbarossa et Midway.
longDescEn: Air-force research that improves squadron range and lethality. "Airborne" scales up to level 2. Maximum effect: "Able to airborne a mechanized infantry in designated areas". Available from the start of research. Essential on Sea Lion, Barbarossa and Midway.
longDescDe: Luftwaffenforschung, die Reichweite und Wirkung der Staffeln erhöht. „Airborne“ skaliert bis Stufe 2. Maximaler Effekt: „Able to airborne a mechanized infantry in designated areas“. Ab Forschungsbeginn verfügbar. Unverzichtbar bei Seelöwe, Barbarossa und Midway.
